posts.text:
.@MaxBlumenthal and I discuss how Zionist actors in the U.S. and Israel waged a psychological warfare campaign that targeted Trump to drive him into war with Iran. To do so, Blumenthal says, they exploited a deep feeling of paranoia in Trump — and convinced him that the Iranians sought to assassinate him. 

Link: piped.video/watch?v=XQGnWJ8l…

.@YanisVaroufakis says that even if the war in Iran ends soon — which it likely will not — the economic consequences will be devastating and prolonged. Watch us discuss how the war will plunge us into global financial crisis. 

Link: piped.video/watch?v=xPhV5bc8…

John Mearsheimer breaks down how the historical record proves that air power does not succeed at implementing regime change or winning wars, making Trump's military adventurism in Iran a futile — and costly — endeavor.

Video
x.com/i/article/203340303309…

This article was originally published at my Substack. To continue my independent journalism, I depend on the generosity and support of my readers. If you'd like to support me directly, you can do so at my Substack: chrishedges.substack.com Thank you for all your support.

John Mearsheimer explains the realignments that may occur in the aftermath of the Iran War, potentially ending America's hegemonic dominance of the region for good.

Video

John Mearsheimer breaks down why Russia and China are supporting Iran. Though they won't admit it, both recognize the U.S. as their foremost enemy — Iran's military success will help weaken their mutual adversary. 
piped.video/watch?v=X7547x5v…

John Mearsheimer explains how Trump may have been lured into Iran by Netanyahu. 

Watch my full interview with John at the link below.

Video
piped.video/watch?v=sl-sSsZn…

On the latest episode of The Chris Hedges Report, John Mearsheimer details how the American Empire stumbled into one of its largest strategic blunders, and what the effects of it all might entail for the rest of the world.

Link: piped.video/watch?v=sl-sSsZn…

"As the US-Israeli war on Iran enters its second week, Pulitzer Prize-winning journalist and bestselling author Chris Hedges joins MEE Live to break down what is really driving this war, where it could lead, and why he calls Trump 'Netanyahu's useful idiot'."
piped.video/watch?v=0SRvL4Pk…

Former British diplomat Alastair Crooke says that America was not prepared for Iran's sophisticated military response. They did not think this through, and the subsequent strategic blunder demonstrates this.  

Watch my full conversation with Alastair at the link below.

Video
piped.video/watch?v=YL8rXeNk…

Alastair Crooke details Iran's missile program — everything from the success of its strikes against Israel and the Gulf states to the economic components of its targets — and paints a picture not found in mainstream media, where the effects of Israeli military censors looms large.
piped.video/watch?v=pJRmkd3H…

Former British diplomat Alastair Crooke details what may have occurred in the critical moments leading up to the American-Israeli war on Iran. It appears, according to Crooke, that Israel indeed may have pressured the White House into the conflict without much consideration of the consequences.
piped.video/watch?v=xwDuc7f-…

The Iran War has just begun — but already, Iran’s military prowess, and America’s and Israel’s impulsive imperial hubris, is on display.

Former British diplomat Alastair Crooke and I assess the situation in Iran on the latest ep. of The Chris Hedges Report. 

Link: piped.video/watch?v=YL8rXeNk…

Ahmed Eldin (@ASE) uses the masculinity problem facing men in America — and, unfortunately, toxically answered for many by MAGA — to explain why empathy is not only a central tenet of communal society, but also journalism. 

Watch my full interview with Ahmed at the link below.

Video
piped.video/watch?v=J2WDveKz…

How Israel Convinced Trump to Wage War Against Iran (w/ Max Blumenthal) | The Chris Hedges Report. Max Blumenthal reports that a psychological warfare campaign orchestrated by Zionist interests targeted Trump to drive him into war with Iran.

How the War With Iran Will Trigger a Global Financial Crisis (w/ Yanis Varoufakis) | The Chris Hedges Report. Yanis Varoufakis says that even if the war in Iran ends soon — which it likely will not — the economic consequences will be devastating and prolonged.

The World According to Gaza. Gaza is only the start. The new world order is one where the weak are obliterated by the strong, the rule of law does not exist, genocide is an instrument of control and barbarism is triumphant.

Why America is Losing the War With Iran (w/ John Mearsheimer) | The Chris Hedges Report. John Mearsheimer details how the American Empire stumbled into one of its largest strategic blunders, and what the effects of it all might entail for the rest of the world.

Can Israel & the U.S. Sustain Iran's Military Power? (w/ Alastair Crooke) | The Chris Hedges Report. The Iran War has just begun — but already, Iran’s military prowess, and America’s and Israel’s impulsive imperial hubris, is on full display.

The Media’s Capitulation to Power (w/ Ahmed Eldin) | The Chris Hedges Report. Chris Hedges and Ahmed Eldin discuss the propagandistic purpose the corporate media serves in the age of the American-Israeli project of genocidal colonialism.
Going to War, Again, for Israel
The Voice of Hind Rajab: The Film They Don’t Want You to See

Epstein, Chomsky, & The Politics of Betrayal (Chris Hedges w/ Briahna Joy Gray). Chris Hedges returns to Bad Faith to engage in a spirited debate about how to act now that liberal incrementalism has led to incremental fascism.
The Suicidal Folly of a War with Iran [VIDEO]

The Predatory Hegemon (w/ Stephen Walt) | The Chris Hedges Report. The abandonment of international allies treaties and norms, Stephen Walt argues, will slowly ostracize the United States and leave the country behind as the multipolar world rises.
LIVE NOW — Come ask a Question! . The Chris Hedges Report is a reader-supported publication.

Resistance101: Forging a New Movement for Palestine in Italy DOCUMENTARY. As the genocide in Gaza has continued for almost three years, Italian dockworkers have risen up to do what our governments and international institutions refuse to.

Chris Hedges Live Documentary Q&A TODAY: Forging a New Movement for Palestine in Italy. Join me today at 3:00pm ET for a live Q&A where we will discuss our new film, 'Resistance 101: Forging a New Movement for Palestine in Italy'
